adapter_feedback: Evaluator feedback: keep the candidate scoped to one declared technique component; preserve safe-signal discipline; require controls, replay, contamination rule-out, budget awareness, and a one-sentence claim test. Do not mutate scorers, oracles, gold, budgets, casebooks, or vulnerability cards. No live target behavior is available in this shadow campaign. Current weakness to address: chunking can hide loss of context; make chunk boundaries and recomposition checks explicit.
summary: Added a scoped decomposition variant that tightens oracle anchoring and replay discipline.
note: Trace intentionally stores hashes and summaries, not raw secrets or live engagement data.
